label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem step by step. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a present of a different color. The initial gifts are: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: white Then there are a series of swaps. The question is, after all the swaps, what present does Claire end up with? Let me write down each step carefully. Maybe I can track each person's gift after each swap. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. - Initially, Eve has white, Bob has orange ball. - After swapping, Eve has the orange ball, and Bob has the white present. Second swap: Eve and Claire swap their gifts. - Before this swap, Eve has orange ball, Claire has green. - After swapping, Eve has green, Claire has orange ball. Third swap: Eve and Dave swap their gifts. - Before this swap, Eve has green, Dave has blue. - After swapping, Eve has blue, Dave has green. Fourth swap: Dave and Alice swap their gifts. - Before this swap, Dave has green, Alice has brown. - After swapping, Dave has brown, Alice has green. Fifth swap: Claire and Dave swap their gifts. - Before this swap, Claire has orange ball, Dave has brown. - After swapping, Claire has brown, Dave has orange ball. So at the end, Claire has the brown present. Let me check my steps again to make sure I didn't make any mistakes. 1. Initial: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: white 2. After Eve and Bob swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: orange ball 3. After Eve and Claire swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: orange ball - Dave: blue - Eve: green 4. After Eve and Dave swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: orange ball - Dave: green - Eve: blue 5. After Dave and Alice swap: - Alice: green - Bob: white - Claire: orange ball - Dave: brown - Eve: blue 6. After Claire and Dave swap: - Alice: green - Bob: white - Claire: brown - Dave: orange ball - Eve: blue Yes, so Claire ends
